phrases.intent_en: Ask if entry to the gardens is free
phrases.cultural_note: The Rocher des Doms gardens are a public park open to everyone at no cost.

responses.english: Yes, it's free and open every day.
responses.phonetic: wee, say grah-TWEE ay oo-VAIR too lay ZHOOR
responses.french: Oui, c'est gratuit et ouvert tous les jours.

phrases.intent_en: Where does the path to the viewpoint start?
phrases.text_local: Le chemin vers le belvédère commence où ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh shuh-MAN vair luh bel-vay-DEHR koh-MONS oo
phrases.cultural_note: The main viewpoint is the practical reason to come up here, so route clarity matters more than sightseeing trivia.

responses.english: Take the main path, straight ahead to the end.
responses.phonetic: pruh-NAY lah-LAY prahn-see-PAL, too DRWAH zhoos-koh BOO
responses.french: Prenez l'allée principale, tout droit jusqu'au bout.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the toilets are in the garden
phrases.text_local: Où sont les toilettes dans le jardin ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo son lay twah-LET dahn luh zhar-DAN
phrases.cultural_note: Public toilets are available in the gardens. They are maintained by the city of Avignon.

responses.english: Near the entrance, on the left.
responses.phonetic: preh duh lahn-TRAY, soor lah GOHSH
responses.french: Près de l'entrée, sur la gauche.

phrases.cultural_note: Walk up Rue des Teinturiers or take a small path from the back of the Palais des Papes. It's a steep 5-minute walk.

responses.english: Go up the stairs from Place du Palais. It's five minutes.
responses.phonetic: mon-TAY layz es-kah-LYAY duh-PWEE lah plahs doo pah-LAY. say sank mee-NOOT
responses.french: Montez les escaliers depuis la place du Palais. C'est cinq minutes.
